Withers Transportation LLC is a small Charlotte NC truck-transport firm (~2-10 employees, NAICS 484, ~$1M revenue) per LinkedIn/LeadIQ — appears to be freight trucking, not school bus / student transport. Distinct from Withers Worldwide (witherstrans.com, Miami FL hospitality logistics, founded 1909). LinkedIn lists HQ at 5616 Amity Pl, Charlotte NC 28212; rank list shows 4516 Randolph Rd #110, Charlotte NC 28211 (possible prior or alt address).
